items.title: Brain backfill — 80 historical sessions
items.detail: Brain counts 80 sessions but only 7 logged via qi.log_session(). Backfill from JSONL files + session summary .docx. Gives real decision/feature counts on the Hive page.

items.title: SessionEnd hook — automatic Brain logging
items.detail: Wire a settings.json SessionEnd hook so every Claude session automatically calls qi.log_session() at close. Currently manual / inconsistent.

items.title: Features Tracked + Decisions Logged — real data wiring
items.detail: Hive page stats currently fall back to proxy calculations (docx count, task count). Wire to real Brain DB tables once backfill is complete.

items.title: Full route audit and documentation
items.detail: Several pages (/services, /tasks, /activity, /logs, /config, /guide) have TBD descriptions in the status docs. Complete a route audit, document each page's render function and data sources.

items.title: Tests page
items.detail: GET /tests is in the nav. Purpose and implementation TBD — to be confirmed from server.py route audit.

items.title: Real-time service restart from dashboard
items.detail: Add a 'Restart' button to the Health page that calls qi_service.restart() for the selected service. Would close the loop: see broken service → click → fixed.

items.title: LLM usage alerts
items.detail: Configurable daily spend threshold. If today's cost exceeds threshold, show a warning badge in the nav. Prevents surprise bills.

items.title: Migrate legacy Agents folder to Brain DB
items.detail: Agent configs currently live in C:\QIH\hive\Agents\*/config.json. Migrate to Brain DB so all projects see the same agent registry via get_agents().

items.title: QI Hive folder migration (C:\QIP, C:\QIB)
items.detail: QI Hive folder strategy: C:\QIP for projects, C:\QIB for business. Migrate one project at a time — tracked in memory file project_qih_folder_strategy.md.

items.title: Per-project nssm.exe packaging
items.detail: Each QI project should ship its own engine/bin/nssm.exe. Confirm QIH has its own copy at C:\QIH\engine\bin\nssm.exe and update NSSM service scripts to use it.
